heading: Use of vehicles
label: 2700 Use of vehicles
text: The Secretary of State may authorize the principal officer of a Foreign Service post to provide for the use of Government owned or leased vehicles located at that post for transportation of United States Government employees and their families when public transportation is unsafe or not available or when such use is advantageous to the Government.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Feb. 15, 1981section 2403 of Pub. L. 96–465section 3901 of this title
